title: Special Event: Northern Limits – Seattle, WA
summary: NORTHERN LIMITS Thurs. February 19, 2015 | 6:30 to 9:00 PM | Seattle, WA On March 17, 2012, Pat Farrell and Caroline Van Hemert embarked on a six-month backcountry adventure; traveling 4,000 miles by rowboat, ski, packraft, foot and canoe from Bellingham, Washington to Kotzebue, Alaska. Please join...
